observation: Shipped creator-surface-convergence-route (this PR): extended scripts/creator-surface-consistency.ts with value-level convergence tracking — per-diverged-token distinct value count (e.g., --line has 10 distinct values across 11 surfaces), convergence delta computation from prior run, and machine-readable JSON report (examples/creator-surface-convergence.json). First run establishes baseline: 14 diverged tokens, 0 shared. Regression: 27/31 PASS (4 pre-existing failures unchanged). Promoted convergence-route to retained_routes. Selected creator-touchdesigner-token-layer-route. Added creator-line-token-alignment-route as replacement candidate.
population: creator CSS token alignment and visual grammar unification across 11 surfaces toward DASH creative-engine warmth + industrial-brutalist constraint + zine-like economy
selection_pressure: move from proof coherence (all gates green) to aesthetic coherence (shared visual DNA recognizable across surfaces) — tighten shared tokens without homogenizing per-surface creative roles

candidates.mutation: Add regression noise filtering (bun creator:regression-filter) that suppresses known pre-existing bun-types lint noise in regression output, producing a clean PASS/FAIL surface report.
candidates.risk: Blocked: regression is currently clean, no noise to filter. May become relevant if bun-types updates introduce new pre-existing lint noise.

candidates.mutation: Dark mode toggle for creator surfaces. DESELECTED 2026-05-16: all surfaces already dark industrial-brutalist palette.
candidates.phenotype: Global dark mode CSS + toggle button
candidates.risk: Deselected 2026-05-16: all 11 surfaces already use dark industrial-brutalist palette.

candidates.mutation: Give creator-touchdesigner-tox.html a :root CSS custom property token layer — currently the only surface with 12 hardcoded color values and zero CSS custom properties. Extract the existing hardcoded values (--bg→#050914, --paper→#f8f1df, --signal→#66e3ff, --accent→#ffb86b, --line→rgba(102,227,255,0.26) etc.), declare them in a :root block, and replace inline hex values with var() references. Verify measure+print still pass.
candidates.phenotype: examples/creator-touchdesigner-tox.html with :root CSS custom property layer + var() references replacing 12 hardcoded values + updated QA evidence (.artifacts/creator-touchdesigner-tox-qa.md)
candidates.risk: Must not alter the visual appearance of the surface. TouchDesigner surface uses minified CSS; the replacement must preserve exact visual output. Verify with browser_vision + measure:check.

candidates.mutation: Align the --line token across surfaces toward warm-paper family consensus. Current state: 10 distinct values across 11 surfaces — the worst token drift. Warm-paper consensus is rgba(21,18,14,0.18). Dark-industrial consensus is rgba(244,234,214,0.12). creative-hybrid lacks consensus. Align warm-paper family (6 surfaces) to that consensus first, handle dark-industrial and creative-hybrid as separate families.
candidates.phenotype: Updated :root --line values on warm-paper surfaces (motion-storyboard, p5-sketch, pdf-zine, poster-surface, prompt-dna, social-card) with measure+print verification + updated QA evidence.
candidates.risk: p5-sketch uses #35584c (hex, not rgba) — likely intentional for creative contrast. Must not force-alignment on surfaces where deviation serves a creative role. Convergence report provides exact per-token distinct value tracking to measure delta.
